first_run.rationale: The score is identical in both evaluations (3/10). The reasoning for the low score is also consistent, citing the same critical and non-negotiable skill gaps in both versions: lack of C/embedded experience, no Linux kernel modification experience, and no Japanese language proficiency. The minor variations in wording in the strengths and concerns sections are well within the bounds of ordinary run-to-run noise and do not reflect any substantive change in the assessment of the candidate's skills.
